Examples

Sample Snippet

IsDatasetReadOnly

Indicates whether the mosaic dataset is in read-only mode. Mosaic dataset operations do not perform write operations on a read-only mosaic.

virtual bool IsDatasetReadOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Indicates whether export items to map space.

virtual bool MapSpace { get; set; }

Returns

bool

The method used for pyramid resampling.

Returns

rstResamplingTypes

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryFilter

The query filter applied on the selection set to identify the collection of catalog items on which to perform the associated operation. If no selection is specified, the query filter is applied on the entire catalog.

virtual IQueryFilter QueryFilter { get; set; }

Returns

IQueryFilter

Examples

Sample Snippet

RecommendedNumThreads(ref int)

The number of parallel threads of execution recommended by the system.

virtual void RecommendedNumThreads(ref int pRecommendedNumThreads)

Parameters

pRecommendedNumThreads int

Sample Snippet

Indicates whether remove distortion if export items to image space.

Sample Snippet

ServerName

The URL to the server object name where parts of the operation may be remotely executed.

virtual string ServerName { get; set; }

Returns

string

Sample Snippet

SkipFirstLevel

Indicates whether pyramids are built with the first level skipped.

virtual bool SkipFirstLevel { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

SnapRaster

The reference raster whose bottom-left corner (XMin, YMin) is used for snapping the output raster's bottom-left corner.

virtual IRaster SnapRaster { get; set; }

Returns

IRaster
